A short description of your Lua package.

## ✨ Features

- Feature item 1
- Feature item 2
- **Multiple Lua Versions**: Compatible with LuaJIT, Lua 5.1, 5.2, 5.3, 5.4, and
  5.5.
- **Cross-Platform**: Works consistently across Windows, macOS, and Linux.

## 📦 Installation

```sh
luarocks install new-repo
```

## 🚀 Usage

```lua
local new_repo = require "new-repo"

my_lib.do_something()
```
